reviews.review_description: So are we paying money for this.
-********* won't install!!! I want my 4.99 back. It's useless!!
I have the S7 and it's very shaky. They need to update this game.
I thought the reviews on here were exaggerated but this game really is a stuttering mess even on an s6.

Was part of the Father's Day dear VR bundle with Samsung. It took me two months of nightmares emails with oculus to receive said bundle. This game as well as all the others included within the bundle are crap. There is no sugar coating it, Oculus doesn't give a crap about you just money
I did enjoy it but it will soon be forgotten
Awesome game especially in a swivel chair. It doesnt have bluetooth audio support. It corrupts the audio.  Wired audio still works great.
Dreadhalls ruined horror for me. I just can't deal anymore. This game is too creepy. If you like creepy, you'll probably like this game.
Creepy in a good way. These games are getting better and better
The basement is in level 2 kinda addicting
Do you ever go down those stairs,and if so what level

This game is not bad but not great either. There's a zombie lady who keeps wandering around the upper levels who sort of keeps you on your toes and makes you feel a little frightened to open doors and explore other areas. 

So far all I've been doing is looking for book pages. That's pretty much all there is. I can't say the game-play is all that engaging but the environments are pretty good.
Great concept but looking for book pages gets boring fast it's not bad for $3 but if your a adult buy dreadhalls instead children would prefer goose bumps though
Absolutely fantastic scared the crap out of me loads of jump scares in this

Game could be brilliant. No controller support, constantly fall through map /levels meaning you can't get out of your hiding place to carry on.  Game randomly crashes but more often than not. You need to quit fully and restart meaning all your progress is undone. Thus had potential to be good.  And my kids were looking forward to it. Shame!!!!

I will admit I've been scared a couple times when I played it. But without able to save your game or pause it makes it very frustrating. If you die you have to restart the game. Just makes it one big loop. When you move around your head with a VR it's a little glitchy. Please fix these glitches. I would consider Stars

Unplayable. The screen studders everytime I look around on my S7 Edge. I can't stay in the game for more than a few seconds. I tried reopening it a day later, but the same issue, so it isnt my phone overheating. Unless they fix this, this is just a waste of storage space.
You cant get out of the bath and you cant save your progress. Please update this and then the game would be brill
This game is fun and has some really good scares. However,  half the time I play this game is very buggy and has lots of lag. An update to fix this would get the game a higher review score.
Wishing they can put options for head track or controller.
